vulnerability.reference: Over-reliance on AI-generated images without systematic morphological validation
vulnerability.generated: Researchers lack biological plausibility filters to distinguish off-manifold synthetic images from real morphologies.

impact.reference: Misleading mode-of-action hypotheses waste substantial drug discovery resources
impact.generated: Misguided mode-of-action hypotheses waste validation resources and delay discovery of effective treatments.

dose_response.reference: Straight-line flow matching generating implausible perturbation trajectories enables drug discovery researchers to produce misleading mode-of-action hypotheses, wasting resources and eroding trust.
dose_response.generated: Straight-line flow matching interpolations deviating from the biological data manifold, when used by drug discovery researchers lacking biological plausibility filters, lead to misguided mode-of-action hypotheses that waste validation resources and delay discovery of effective treatments.
